summary: Iteration 9 (Fork·Fate order-buttons + reports + delete-removed + Chicken Wings + logo). Backend: 14/14 pytest passed. Frontend: logo, chicken wings button, result card with DoorDash/Order online/Reviews & ratings/Suggest removal, grid cards with DoorDash+Reviews+Suggest removal, no delete buttons anywhere, food/drinks toggle, reports POST + success toast — all verified live.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx is ~470 lines and contains multiple components (Home, ShufflingDeck, RevealStage) — consider splitting RevealStage/ShufflingDeck into their own files for maintainability.
reports collection has no index; if traffic grows add index on created_at/status.
Rate-limit buckets are per-pod in-memory only — fine for MVP but won't work behind multi-replica ingress.
seed_data_creation: Test created one TEST_ restaurant via POST /api/restaurants and one report doc via POST /api/reports (both left in DB, non-conflicting).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend seed = 33 (25 food incl Buffalo Junction + Cluck & Fire wings, 8 drinks). DELETE /api/restaurants/{id} intentionally removed — DELETE returns 405. Reports endpoint POST /api/reports returns {ok:true,id}. All curated items and created items now carry google_url/doordash_url/order_url. Logo at /logo.png (1MB). Backend URL: https://lucky-bite-1.preview.emergentagent.com.
